creator: linuxgeek@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 156942
patch to update lang/tcbasic to 2.1.0

New upstream version of lang/tcbasic. The new version fixes over a dozen defects and adds additional built-in functions.

The attached patch updates the version in the Makefile, regenerates the distinfo, and updates the pkg-descr. Tested on FreeBSD 10.1.
